title: interface port member select incorrectly flagged as hierarchical path

features.name: interface with parameter as module port
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a parameter that is passed to a module via a module port

features.name: interface port member select for parameter access
features.description: Code should include accessing an interface port's parameter using member select notation from within a module

features.name: interface parameter via hierarchical reference in display
features.description: Code should include accessing an interface parameter through a module instance hierarchy in a display statement
